title: AN ACT CONVERTING THE NAME OF SAN NARCISO VOCATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL IN SAN NARCISO, PROVINCE OF QUEZON TO GODOFREDO M. TAN MEMORIAL SCHOOL OF ARTS AND TRADES

chunks.text:
H. No. 2222; 106 OG No. 6, 733 (February 8, 2010)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 9754, November 10, 2009 ]

AN ACT CONVERTING THE NAME OF SAN NARCISO VOCATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL IN SAN NARCISO, PROVINCE OF QUEZON TO GODOFREDO M. TAN MEMORIAL SCHOOL OF ARTS AND TRADES

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representative of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SEC. 1.

Renaming of High School.

â The name of San Narciso Vocational High School in the Municipality of San Narciso, Province of Quezon is hereby changed to Godofredo M. Tan Memorial School of Arts and Trades.

SEC. 2.

Effectivity.

â This Act shall take effect fifteen (15) days after its publication in the

Official Gazette

.

Approved,

(Sgd.) JUAN PONCE ENRILE

(Sgd.) PROSPERO C. NOGRALES

President of Senate

Speaker of the House of Representatives

This Act which originated in the House of Representatives was finally passed by the House of Representatives and the Senate on June 11, 2008 and August 25, 2009, respectively.

(Sgd.) EMMA LIRIO-REYES

(Sgd.) MARILYN B. BARUA-YAP

Secretary of Senate

Secretary General House of Representatives

Approved: NOV 10 2009

(Sgd.) GLORIA MACAPAGAL - ARROYO

President of the Philippines
